item.description: -The angryiest woman on TV, Jillian Michaels joins us -The crew come up with a naughty new idea, the Pocket Rocket race - The producers have a prank idea for the show - The legend Jonathon Thurston pops in - Dick of the week is crowned to Monica -Producers Diary -Aaron our weekend Cliffhanger is proposing
